further_reading.title: Cookiecutter Data Science
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a widely used reference project layout for separating code, data, notebooks, and outputs.

further_reading.title: nbdime
further_reading.why_relevant: Shows practical tooling for diffing and merging notebooks without treating them like ordinary text files.

further_reading.title: nbstripout
further_reading.why_relevant: Directly supports the module's version-control hygiene advice by stripping notebook outputs and noisy metadata.

notes: No inline-citation candidates were identified in the narrative body. The module is predominantly pedagogical and normative best-practice guidance rather than a set of specific factual claims. Quiz items, exercise steps, code blocks, the example project tree, and Next Modules links were intentionally excluded per instructions.
